who: restaurant kitchen managers processing 5–15 labor cost reports/week
offer: For restaurant kitchen managers processing 5–15 labor cost reports/week, inaccurate reporting causes budget overruns. We provide daily labor cost reports instead of manual spreadsheets and guesswork.
problem: Inaccurate labor cost reporting leads to budget overruns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant kitchen managers
Indie Hackers posts about labor cost reporting
DM outreach to restaurant kitchen managers with demo video
Community forums where restaurant managers share tools
try_it: Let users try daily report generation and manual entry for adjustments on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
